title: Elution of Nasal Lining Fluid Collected via Nasosorption
author: Samuel Montgomery

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.05 % volume of Tween20 to PBS in a sterile environment to reduce cross-contamination

steps.title: Thaw nasosorption device in cryotube on ice
steps.instruction: Thaw nasosorption device in cryotube on ice

steps.title: Add 300 µL of elution buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 300 µL of elution buffer to a labelled 2mL microcentrifuge tube and place on ice

steps.title: Remove the synthetic absorptive matrix (SAM)...
steps.instruction: Remove the synthetic absorptive matrix (SAM) from the nasosorption device using sterile forceps by tearing it from the handle and place in the microcentrifuge tube containing elution buffer

steps.title: Using a new pair of sterile...
steps.instruction: Using a new pair of sterile forceps, remove the SAM from the elution buffer, and place into a spinX column on a new 2mL microcentrifuge tube

steps.title: Add the elution buffer from the...
steps.instruction: Add the elution buffer from the first tube onto the SAM in the spinX column

steps.title: Centrifuge the SAM and spinX column...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the SAM and spinX column at 16000 x g, °C, for 00:30:00 at 4 °C

steps.title: Discard the spinX column and SAM
steps.instruction: Discard the spinX column and SAM

steps.title: Aliquot the eluate into labelled microtubes,...
steps.instruction: Aliquot the eluate into labelled microtubes, and measure total protein concentration using the assay of your choice (Pierce BCA assay, Qubit protein assay etc)
